channel.title: bbcnews TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbcnews

item.title: The Andes strain of the virus has been confirmed in two passengers who were taken to South Africa, according to the country's health minister. The ship, MV Hondius, was travelling from Argentina across the Atlantic to Cape Verde. #Hantavirus #Cruise #Sout
item.description: The Andes strain of the virus has been confirmed in two passengers who were taken to South Africa, according to the country's health minister. The ship, MV Hondius, was travelling from Argentina across the Atlantic to Cape Verde. #Hantavirus #Cruise #Sout

item.title: Voters in many parts of England will get the chance to elect their local representatives on Thursday 7 May. #CouncilElections #UKPolitics #BBCNews
item.description: Voters in many parts of England will get the chance to elect their local representatives on Thursday 7 May. #CouncilElections #UKPolitics #BBCNews

item.title: Feeling lost when it comes to politics? Tap the link to subscribe to the BBC's Politics Essential newsletter for the top analysis and insight from across the UK. #Politics #UKPolitics #Election #News #BBCNews
item.description: Feeling lost when it comes to politics? Tap the link to subscribe to the BBC's Politics Essential newsletter for the top analysis and insight from across the UK. #Politics #UKPolitics #Election #News #BBCNews

item.title: Three people were evacuated from the MV Hondius in Cape Verde on Wednesday morning - they are from Britain, Germany and the Netherlands. #Cruise #Hantavirus #CanaryIslands #News #BBCNews
item.description: Three people were evacuated from the MV Hondius in Cape Verde on Wednesday morning - they are from Britain, Germany and the Netherlands. #Cruise #Hantavirus #CanaryIslands #News #BBCNews

item.title: Three patients were evacuated from the virus-hit cruise ship off Cape Verde on Wednesday. #Hantavirus #Health #Outbreak #CapeVerde #BBCNews
item.description: Three patients were evacuated from the virus-hit cruise ship off Cape Verde on Wednesday. #Hantavirus #Health #Outbreak #CapeVerde #BBCNews

item.title: No Title
item.description: No Description

item.title: Are the US and Iran close to a deal? #MiddleEast #Iran #US #News #BBCNews
item.description: Are the US and Iran close to a deal? #MiddleEast #Iran #US #News #BBCNews

item.title: A video filmed by a passenger on board the MV Hondius shows its captain saying that a man who had died there passed away due to "natural causes". Oceanwide Expeditions, the cruise ship operator, told the BBC the first report of hantavirus came "after dise
item.description: A video filmed by a passenger on board the MV Hondius shows its captain saying that a man who had died there passed away due to "natural causes". Oceanwide Expeditions, the cruise ship operator, told the BBC the first report of hantavirus came "after dise

item.title: The state of the roads is a hot topic among voters ahead of Thursday's English local elections. #Potholes #Roads #Transport #Elections #BBCNews
item.description: The state of the roads is a hot topic among voters ahead of Thursday's English local elections. #Potholes #Roads #Transport #Elections #BBCNews

item.title: An Israeli air strike has hit the southern suburbs of Beirut, the first attack on Lebanon's capital since a ceasefire was agreed in April. #Beirut #Lebanon #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews
item.description: An Israeli air strike has hit the southern suburbs of Beirut, the first attack on Lebanon's capital since a ceasefire was agreed in April. #Beirut #Lebanon #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews

item.title: In the last three months around 2,400 jobs have been lost. #Pub #Hospitality #Wales #Scotland #Wales #Britain #BBCNews
item.description: In the last three months around 2,400 jobs have been lost. #Pub #Hospitality #Wales #Scotland #Wales #Britain #BBCNews

item.title: Nearly two million seats have been removed from flights scheduled for May, with Munich and Istanbul among the worst-hit destinations. #Flights #Holidays #Travel #UK #BBCNews
item.description: Nearly two million seats have been removed from flights scheduled for May, with Munich and Istanbul among the worst-hit destinations. #Flights #Holidays #Travel #UK #BBCNews

item.title: Holidaymakers are being urged not to change their travel plans due to concerns over jet fuel supplies, as there is currently no shortage in the UK and contingency plans are in place. #Travel #Aviation #Holidays #Flights #BBCNews
item.description: Holidaymakers are being urged not to change their travel plans due to concerns over jet fuel supplies, as there is currently no shortage in the UK and contingency plans are in place. #Travel #Aviation #Holidays #Flights #BBCNews

item.title: Two British people are self-isolating at home in the UK according to the UK Health Security Agency. #Hantavirus #UK #UKHSA #Cruise #BBCNews
item.description: Two British people are self-isolating at home in the UK according to the UK Health Security Agency. #Hantavirus #UK #UKHSA #Cruise #BBCNews

item.title: The world's largest contemporary art exhibition, which takes place every two years, features artists from several countries in conflict, including Ukraine, Israel and the United States, although Iran has cancelled its plans to attend. #VeniceBiennale #Ukr
item.description: The world's largest contemporary art exhibition, which takes place every two years, features artists from several countries in conflict, including Ukraine, Israel and the United States, although Iran has cancelled its plans to attend. #VeniceBiennale #Ukr

item.title: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky says the country has taken a Russian position using just “unmanned platforms” for the first time in the war. #UkraineWar #Zelensky #Drones #Russia #BBCNews
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky says the country has taken a Russian position using just “unmanned platforms” for the first time in the war. #UkraineWar #Zelensky #Drones #Russia #BBCNews

item.title: The company limited access for most UK users in February - only permitting those who had previously registered with and verified their age. #OnlineSafetyAct #Technology #UK #Apple #BBCNews
item.description: The company limited access for most UK users in February - only permitting those who had previously registered with and verified their age. #OnlineSafetyAct #Technology #UK #Apple #BBCNews

item.title: Dr Martin Kriz, who has worked on the hantavirus-hit MV Hondius cruise ship in the past, describes the medical facilities on board. #Hantavirus #Cruise #CruiseShip #News #BBCNews
item.description: Dr Martin Kriz, who has worked on the hantavirus-hit MV Hondius cruise ship in the past, describes the medical facilities on board. #Hantavirus #Cruise #CruiseShip #News #BBCNews

item.title: A former FedEx delivery driver was sentenced to death on Tuesday after he pleaded guilty to killing a seven-year-old Texas girl. #FedEx #Texas #USNews #BBCNews
item.description: A former FedEx delivery driver was sentenced to death on Tuesday after he pleaded guilty to killing a seven-year-old Texas girl. #FedEx #Texas #USNews #BBCNews

item.title: The lawsuit accused Apple of false advertising around its AI features on the iPhone. #iPhone #Apple #AI #Tech #BBCNews
item.description: The lawsuit accused Apple of false advertising around its AI features on the iPhone. #iPhone #Apple #AI #Tech #BBCNews

item.title: The Andes strain of hantavirus is mostly found in Argentina and Chile and is thought to spread by human-to-human transmission, although very rarely. #Hantavirus #Andes #Cruise #News #BBCNews
item.description: The Andes strain of hantavirus is mostly found in Argentina and Chile and is thought to spread by human-to-human transmission, although very rarely. #Hantavirus #Andes #Cruise #News #BBCNews

item.title: US President Donald Trump has said the military operation to guide stranded merchant ships through the Strait of Hormuz will be paused just two days after he announced it. #US #DonaldTrump #StraitOfHormuz #Iran #BBCNews
item.description: US President Donald Trump has said the military operation to guide stranded merchant ships through the Strait of Hormuz will be paused just two days after he announced it. #US #DonaldTrump #StraitOfHormuz #Iran #BBCNews

item.title: Turkish YouTuber Ruhi Çenet, who was previously on board the cruise ship, told the BBC that no immediate safety precautions were taken at the time. Oceanwide Expeditions, the cruise ship operator, told the BBC the first report of hantavirus came "after di
item.description: Turkish YouTuber Ruhi Çenet, who was previously on board the cruise ship, told the BBC that no immediate safety precautions were taken at the time. Oceanwide Expeditions, the cruise ship operator, told the BBC the first report of hantavirus came "after di

item.title: Why did a rice cooker lead to a £260k payout for sacked university cleaner? #Rice #Employment #Wales #Aberystwyth #BBCNews
item.description: Why did a rice cooker lead to a £260k payout for sacked university cleaner? #Rice #Employment #Wales #Aberystwyth #BBCNews

item.title: Iran says a deal with the US to end the war is 'still being considered', as both countries threaten renewed violence if a deal is not agreed to. #US #Iran #DonaldTrump #WhiteHouse #BBCNews
item.description: Iran says a deal with the US to end the war is 'still being considered', as both countries threaten renewed violence if a deal is not agreed to. #US #Iran #DonaldTrump #WhiteHouse #BBCNews

item.title: Two people in a serious condition who were evacuated from a Hantavirus-hit cruise ship have arrived in the Netherlands for treatment, operator Oceanwide Expeditions has said. #Hantavirus #Amsterdam #CruiseShip #Netherlands #MVHondius #BBCNews
item.description: Two people in a serious condition who were evacuated from a Hantavirus-hit cruise ship have arrived in the Netherlands for treatment, operator Oceanwide Expeditions has said. #Hantavirus #Amsterdam #CruiseShip #Netherlands #MVHondius #BBCNews

item.title: On 8 April, Israel says it hit 100 targets within 10 minutes across Lebanon. The IDF says it targeted 250 Hezbollah operatives that day but has not provided a full list of names. Asked what steps were taken to protect civilians, the IDF said it made "exte
item.description: On 8 April, Israel says it hit 100 targets within 10 minutes across Lebanon. The IDF says it targeted 250 Hezbollah operatives that day but has not provided a full list of names. Asked what steps were taken to protect civilians, the IDF said it made "exte

item.title: Train passengers in southern England are facing major disruption after a radio system fault. #Trains #England #TrainTravel #TrainDelays #BBCNews
item.description: Train passengers in southern England are facing major disruption after a radio system fault. #Trains #England #TrainTravel #TrainDelays #BBCNews

item.title: The UK Health Security Agency says the risk of hantavirus to the wider population is very low, as person-to-person transmission is rare. #Hantavirus #Cruise #CruiseShip #News #BBCNews
item.description: The UK Health Security Agency says the risk of hantavirus to the wider population is very low, as person-to-person transmission is rare. #Hantavirus #Cruise #CruiseShip #News #BBCNews

item.title: Ministers in England have asked experts whether CCTV should be required in all nurseries, and a committee of MPs is also examining whether children in early years settings are properly protected. #CCTV #Nurseries #Stockport #News #BBCNews
item.description: Ministers in England have asked experts whether CCTV should be required in all nurseries, and a committee of MPs is also examining whether children in early years settings are properly protected. #CCTV #Nurseries #Stockport #News #BBCNews
